scope: Non-Chinese, non-Japanese and non-Korean foreign-language instruments currently represented in Compliance Compass, plus jurisdictions whose official legal text is English.

preferredSources: issuing-authority English translation with an explicit reuse basis
policy.projectTranslationRule: A project-authored translation may be stored only when the controlling original is pinned, the translation is complete at the provision level, the non-official status is prominent, and no protected third-party translation is adapted.
excludedSources: machine output presented as official or authoritative text

instruments.versionBoundary: The ANPD English reference published 6 November 2024 predates Law No. 15,352/2026 for Articles 5, 55-A and 55-C. Those three nodes use separately labelled current project translations and retain the superseded ANPD wording as historical metadata.
instruments.rightsBoundary: ANPD source is published under CC BY-ND 3.0; project-authored current references are CC BY 4.0. Portuguese controls.

instruments.versionBoundary: Pending Senate-approved autograph transmitted to the Chamber; every English node is aligned to the pinned Portuguese proposal while preserving its not-law status.
instruments.rightsBoundary: The project-authored, machine-assisted English reference is CC BY 4.0, nonofficial and without legal effect. The Portuguese autograph controls and remains a pending bill. Commercial translations were not copied.
Government translation excluded from copyright under Taiwan Copyright Act Article 9; Traditional Chinese controls.

instruments.versionBoundary: The official latest Chinese and English consolidation includes amendments promulgated 11 November 2025 whose commencement is still to be set. Applicability metadata identifies the current-effective older text where necessary.
instruments.rightsBoundary: Government translation excluded from copyright under Taiwan Copyright Act Article 9; Traditional Chinese controls.

instruments.versionBoundary: Final Traditional-Chinese guidance issued 3 October 2023. Every project English node is aligned to the pinned final guidance; the Executive Yuan English page describes approval of a draft and is not a complete translation of the final points.
instruments.rightsBoundary: The project-authored English reference is CC BY 4.0, nonofficial and without legal effect. The official Traditional-Chinese guidance controls and remains non-binding. Commercial translations were not copied.

instruments.versionBoundary: Current HKeL whole-chapter version dated 1 October 2022, retrieved 20 July 2026; commencement metadata is provision-specific.
instruments.rightsBoundary: English and Chinese are equally authentic; reuse follows DATA.GOV.HK Terms and Conditions 1.2 with attribution.

instruments.versionBoundary: Law No. 27 of 2022 with the binding Article 53 interpretation from Constitutional Court Decision 151/PUU-XXII/2024; the English layer applies and discloses the current-operative interpretation.
instruments.rightsBoundary: The project-authored, machine-assisted English reference is CC BY 4.0, nonofficial and without legal effect. The Indonesian Gazette text and Constitutional Court decision control. A translation-team publication expressly labelled nonofficial was consulted only for terminology and was not copied.

instruments.versionBoundary: Law No. 91/2025/QH15, enacted 26 June 2025 and effective 1 January 2026; each English node is aligned to the pinned current Vietnamese node.
instruments.rightsBoundary: The project-authored, machine-assisted English reference is CC BY 4.0, nonofficial and without legal effect. Official Vietnamese controls. Commercial translations were not copied.

instruments.versionBoundary: Decree No. 356/2025/NĐ-CP, issued 31 December 2025 and effective 1 January 2026; each English node is aligned to the pinned current Vietnamese node.
instruments.rightsBoundary: The project-authored, machine-assisted English reference is CC BY 4.0, nonofficial and without legal effect. Official Vietnamese controls. Commercial translations were not copied.

instruments.versionBoundary: Historical decree effective 1 July 2023 through 31 December 2025 and repealed by Decree 356/2025; every English node is aligned to the stored historical Vietnamese version.
instruments.rightsBoundary: The project-authored, machine-assisted English reference is CC BY 4.0, nonofficial and without legal effect. Official Vietnamese controls for the Decree's former effective period. Third-party and subscription translations were not copied.

instruments.versionBoundary: Federal Decree-Law No. 45 of 2021, effective 2 January 2022.
instruments.rightsBoundary: Official laws, regulations and official translations are excluded from copyright under UAE Federal Decree-Law No. 38 of 2021, Article 3; Arabic prevails.

instruments.versionBoundary: Royal Decree M/19 consolidated with Royal Decree M/148 amendments; effective 14 September 2023.
instruments.rightsBoundary: Laws, regulations and official translations are excluded from copyright under Saudi Copyright Law Article 4; Arabic controls.

instruments.versionBoundary: Implementing Regulation effective with the amended Law on 14 September 2023.
instruments.rightsBoundary: Official translation; Arabic controls; Saudi Copyright Law Article 4 boundary applies.

instruments.versionBoundary: Version 2.0 dated August 2024; Article 9 ties effect to Official Gazette publication.
instruments.rightsBoundary: Official translation; Arabic controls; Saudi Copyright Law Article 4 boundary applies.

instruments.versionBoundary: Fedlex consolidation applicable from 7 July 2025 and open-ended as of 20 July 2026.
instruments.rightsBoundary: German, French and Italian are equally authoritative; official English has no legal force. Fedlex authorises reuse under its third-party-user information with attribution.
